CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITOL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YANCEY, STEVEN SCOTT POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: -REGARDING DESCRIPTION OF THE EQUIPMENT, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH., OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $10,018.11 DAMAGES, $1,350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $361.63 COSTS, $142.48 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,872.22, PROPERTY (FAIR MARKET VALUE) VALUE: $6,000.00; PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO ITS IMMEDIATE POSSESION OF THE EQUIPMENT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
